spec.description: Dashboard for Spring Boot2.1 Statistics(based on Spring Boot2 Statistic by micrometer-prometheus).

spec.title: OS CPU iowait & idle (%)
spec.description: Host CPU iowait and idle metrics from Node Exporter to detect Thrashing

spec.title: OS Disk Usage
spec.description: Host Disk Space Usage from Node Exporter

spec.title: OS Memory/Swap Usage
spec.description: Host Swap Space and Memory Usage from Node Exporter to detect Thrashing

spec.title: CloudWatch Application Logs
spec.description: Real-time application logs from AWS CloudWatch Logs (/aws/ec2/nemologic)

spec.title: JVM Heap Memory Usage
spec.description: JVM Heap Memory Used vs Max (MB)

spec.title: HikariCP Connection Pool
spec.description: Active, Pending and Max Connections in HikariCP Pool

spec.title: Rotagic Unified Monitor
